## Reviewer Notes

- `A` is the total exponent in the affine denominator `2^A`.
- The valuation word is forced by residue modulo `2^(A+1)`, not merely `2^A`.
- `gap = 2^A - 3^m`; `B = ceil(b / gap)`; if `n > B`, then `T^m(n) < n`.
- Status line: `84-LABEL SYMBOLIC CERTIFICATE PACKET STABLE THROUGH k41`.
